initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    ca_state,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN reason ON catalog_sales.cs_promo_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND reason.r_reason_desc = 'reason 28'
GROUP BY 
    i_category,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_category,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_category,
    ca_state,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
JOIN 
    item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    reason ON catalog_sales.cs_promo_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND reason.r_reason_desc = 'reason 28'
GROUP BY 
    i_category, ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_category, ca_state
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_category, 
    ca_state, 
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN reason ON catalog_sales.cs_promo_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND reason.r_reason_desc = 'reason 28'
GROUP BY 
    i_category,

ORDER BY 
    i_category, 
    ca_state

SELECT 
    i_category,
    ca_state,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN promotion ON catalog_sales.cs_promo_sk = promotion.p_promo_sk
    JOIN reason ON promotion.p_promo_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2001
    AND reason.r_reason_desc = 'reason 28'
GROUP BY 
    i_category,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_category,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100;

    JOIN reason ON catalog_sales.cs_promo_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
